title: Peruvian Shrimp Skewers with Magical Grilled Flavor
description: A fusion dish combining the spicy flavors of Peru with the magical twist of grilled perfection. Succulent shrimp skewers marinated in a zesty mixture of Peruvian spices and grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Magical Grilled Seasoning
ingredients.notes: A secret blend of spices and herbs

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Magical Grilled Seasoning, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, cumin, and coriander.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the shrimp onto the Peruvian skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Brush the skewers with additional olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro and lime wedges.
